result.stdout:
AGUI Client - AI-powered development assistant

Usage:
  aix [command] [options]

Commands:
  chat        Start interactive chat session with AI assistant
  config      Manage configuration settings

Options:
  --help, -h      Show help information
  --version, -v   Show version information

Examples:
  aix chat
  aix config agui-url https://172.26.100.144:8800/api/code
